title: La fiancée des ténèbres
writer: Jean Anouilh, Gaston Bonheur, Henri Calef
actors: Pierre Richard-Willm, Jany Holt, Line Noro
plot: Sylvie, a girl who believes she is cursed having seen her two lovers die in tragic circumstances, lives in the town of Carcassonne, in the South of France with her adoptive guardian, Mr. Toulzac. This one, a retired school teacher...
